extra_descs.desc:
The statue is that of a warrior who is dressed in robes of silk carrying a
sword at his side and a fan in his hand.  It appears to be that of the ancient
samurai warriors.

The basin is granite and it is carved by hand as-if every piece of the stone
were removed into the very shape to make it into the beautiful piece that it
really is.  There is a statue in the center, no doubt a centerpiece god that is
worshipped here in this pagoda.

The foutain is a corner one and it is being fed from a spring that flows from
a spigot from the wall.  The water flows into the basin below with a quiet
splashing.

long_desc: A large corner fountain is here

extra_descs.desc:
The shrine is large and boxy, with gold trim and it shines in the medium
light of the many lanterns that light this Pagoda.  It has an insription what
appears to be a poem, but it is written in a foreign language which you do not
understand.

long_desc: A shrine made of teak and gold is here.
short_desc: a shrine made of teak and gold

extra_descs.desc:
The lantern is about 3 feet high and about 3 feet in diameter, made off metal
glass and wire, giving off a warm glow.

long_desc: A shining bronze lantern is here.

extra_descs.desc:
The pillar it stands on of simple marble with many carvings of different
designs belonging to many parts of the realms found on TBAMUD.  Com.  There are
inscriptions on the side and decorative grooves that make it up.  It is very
well designed.

The statuehead is a head and partial shoulders that depicts one of the many
gods who works over this realm as a builder.  Its resemblene is uncanny to one
of the many builders who work here.  It is made of a hi-tech material that it
allows holograms to be placed over the plaster mold that it covers.

long_desc: A statuehead on a pedistal stands here.

extra_descs.desc:
The couch is colored blue and white and it stands on four legs looking very
comfortable.  It appears to be used as a waiting place for mortals looking to
meet with the immortals.

long_desc: A plush couch is sitting here against the wall.

extra_descs.desc:
The altar is made of gold and twisted marble.  It has a shiny well finished
appearance in its construction with the rune symbol of Whiteknight carved on the
side of it.  There are candles and incense burners incorperated in the design
and they smolder gently.

The incense is stuck out of the top from small holes and it smells like wild
honeysuckle.  Very refreshing.

The shrine here is smaller and made of marble, trimmed in flexible strips of
ornamental oak wood.  It has cubbies where small candles burn and incense burns
honoring the god or goddess here.

long_desc: A small shrine made of marble is here
short_desc: a small shrine made of marble

extra_descs.desc:
The painting here represents the Last Judgement of Christ our Redeemer
standing forth at the great white throne of judgement as he casts his judgement
upon the souls that stand before him.  It has a lot of floaty representation with
background color and flowing design.  It is uplifting.

long_desc: An oil painting of the Last Judgement hangs here.
short_desc: a large oil painting of the Last Judgement

extra_descs.desc:
The painting here is the Last Supper where Christ and the Disciples sit
together at the familiar long table and have the famous dinner before his
crucifixion.  It is absolutely stunning, the design and painting representation
that is here.

long_desc: An oil painting of the Last Supper hangs here.
short_desc: an oil painting of the Last Supper

extra_descs.desc:
The arrow is made of glass, metal and plastic and it hangs over the main exit
which happens to be south, over the step up into the Main Upper Imm Hall.  On
the surface, in red letters, on the green glass is the word 'EXIT:'

long_desc: A glowing exit arrow is here, hanging from the ceiling.

extra_descs.desc:
The arrow is made of glass, metal and plastic and hangs over the main exit of
the room.  It has the words 'EXIT' written in red letters on the green glass
lens and an arrow ->.

long_desc: A glowing exit arrow is here, hanging from the ceiling.

extra_descs.desc:
The proud stars and stripes are set strongly against the blue background of
the morning sky. Someone has raised the flag in hopes that our dear friend,
Rumble, returns from his service in Iraq. May his courage and strength keep him
safe, and let the great banner of our great nation always watch over him.
Return home my friend.

long_desc: An American Flag hangs from the wall in honor for the 9/11 Victims.
